state.draft:
Subject: Regarding Your Broken Phone

Dear [Customer Name],

We're very sorry to hear your phone has broken. We understand this is frustrating, and we want to help resolve it for you as quickly as possible.

To assist you best, please reply with some additional details:
*   Your phone's model
*   When you purchased it
*   A brief description of what happened
*   Whether it is currently under warranty

You can also find immediate support and repair options on our website here: [Link to Repair/Support Page]

Alternatively, please feel free to call us directly at [Phone Number] if you prefer to speak with someone.

We appreciate your patience and look forward to helping.

Sincerely,

The [Your Company Name] Team

parts.text:
Subject: Regarding Your Phone Issue - How Can We Help?

Dear Customer,

I'm very sorry to hear that your phone has broken. I understand how frustrating and inconvenient this can be, and we're here to help you get this resolved as quickly as possible.

To assist you effectively, could you please provide us with a few more details about the issue? This will help us understand the problem and determine the best course of action.

Please let us know:
*   **What is the model of your phone?** (e.g., [Brand] [Model Name/Number])
*   **When did you purchase it?** (An approximate date is fine if you don't have the exact one)
*   **Could you describe what happened or what isn't working specifically?** For example, is the screen cracked, is it not turning on, are you experiencing battery issues, or something else?

Once we have this information, we'll be better able to advise on the next steps, which may include troubleshooting tips, repair options, or potential warranty assistance.

Please reply to this email with the requested details. If you prefer to speak with someone directly, you can also call us at [Your Company Phone Number] during our business hours, [Your Business Hours].

Thank you for your patience and cooperation. We look forward to hearing from you and helping you resolve this.

Sincerely,

The [Your Company Name] Support Team
